form.formComment: Returns from a 41-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 7 at this track on February 27 over 1207m, 6 len behind Infamous Nono carrying 54.5kg at $7.20. The run before that 6th of 10 at Charles Town on February 4 over 1308m, 5.5 len behind Tour Guide with 52kg at $33.10. Genuine chance this time around.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming 3rd of 7 at this track on February 27 over 1207m, 2.75 len behind Infamous Nono with 56kg at $17. Not far away last time but hard to have in this contest.
